sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61710" key="lakedw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾱκεδών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n61710.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bawling, wild talk</tr_>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
